evidence: TASK-081 narrow scope implementation complete on branch task-081-jit-agents-grant-clamp. Four impl commits: dee01a5 (types.ts fields), 4e9a866 (compile.ts thread), a273ab9 (clamp + error class), d3cf81f (4 tests). Three verification layers all green: build/check/test, runtime demo (3/3), adversarial probe (9/9). NOTE on filing: d287b0f attempted to file this VER + status update + edge in one commit but the status-update threw on tasks-schema if/then conditional (status=completed requires verification field which the script omitted); the edge committed but VER + status update did not. This file (committed separately) completes that trio: files VER-052 + updates TASK-081 status with the required verification field. The d287b0f commit message overstated landing; this commit corrects.
